title: The False Positive Trade-Off: GPD vs. PhaseNet and EQTransformer
subtitle: Why the fastest AI seismic picker struggles with over-picking, even after extensive fine-tuning.
description: An architectural comparison of GPD, PhaseNet, and EQTransformer. While GPD offers unmatched inference speed via its 4-second window vector classification, it structurally generates severe false positives.
excerpt: GPD is incredibly fast but fundamentally prone to over-picking. Learn why its 4-second classification windows and vector labels lead to overwhelming false positives compared to PhaseNet and EQTransformer.
hero_caption: Comparative AI model outputs showing GPD's dense cluster of false positive picks against a clean PhaseNet arrival.
hero_aria: Seismic waveform visualization showing dense noisy false positive markers next to clean, precise ones.
